sub_modules.fft_bit_reverse_index: Combinational bit-reversal index mapper used during input loading so the iterative DIT FFT produces natural-order output bins.
sub_modules.fft_index_gen: Combinational radix-2 stage controller helper that maps the current stage and butterfly count to memory pair addresses and twiddle address.
sub_modules.fft_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16 using the exact specified cosine and sine encodings.
sub_modules.fft_butterfly_fixed: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with Q1.15 twiddle multiplication, FFT/IFFT conjugation mode support, and no per-stage scaling.
